Off Calendar May-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John E. Lacklen, Esq., of the Law Offices of John E. Lacklen, Tel. 510.839.7837, counsel for plaintiff, and moving party.
Randolph Martin Vargas, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf.

The parties were ordered to meet and confer. The plaintiff did not oppose the motion. After hearing, ATTY. JOHN E. LACKLEN'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF MARTIN VARGAS is granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Angie Diner CSR # 9581
